title: Generate pytest API tests for Restful Booker create booking
goal: Generate executable pytest tests for POST /booking using the Restful Booker API contract.
required_context: Create booking requires firstname, lastname, totalprice, depositpaid, bookingdates, and additionalneeds
Request header Content-Type should be application/json
Successful create booking response includes bookingid and booking
success_criteria: generated tests execute against Restful Booker
at least one create booking test passes
